properties.title: Turkey says NATO air defences destroyed a ballistic missile fired from Iran headed into Turkish airspace; debris reported in Hatay area
properties.location_resolved: Hatay Mutfağı, Termesos Bulvarı, Mehmetçik Mahallesi, Antalya, Muratpaşa, Antalya, Mediterranean Region, 07030, Turkey
properties.implication: Potential widening to a NATO member raises escalation tail-risk and supports risk_off_flows and em_fx_pressure.

properties.title: Rare tanker transit to load Murban crude via Strait of Hormuz amid shipping disruption (Pola to Jebel Dhanna)
properties.location_resolved: Danat Resort Jebel Dhanna, As Saffar Street, Al Dhannah, Al Dhafrah Region, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
properties.implication: Suggests partial/episodic navigation but under elevated operational risk; volatility in flows persists.

properties.title: Israel orders evacuation of a swathe of southern Lebanon including Tyre; Israeli strike hits building in Baalbek
properties.location_resolved: Tyre, Tyre District, South Governorate, 1601, Lebanon
properties.implication: Lebanon theatre escalation broadens regional conflict footprint; increases risk-off flows and local operational disruption.

properties.title: Israel orders evacuation across swathe of south Lebanon as hostilities with Hezbollah escalate
properties.location_resolved: Tyre, Tyre District, South Governorate, 1601, Lebanon
properties.implication: Second front increases geopolitical tail risk and risk-off sentiment, though direct oil flow impact is indirect.

properties.title: Israel orders evacuation of swathe of southern Lebanon as hostilities with Hezbollah intensify; strike in Baalbek reported
properties.location_resolved: Tyre, Tyre District, South Governorate, 1601, Lebanon
properties.implication: Escalation in Lebanon increases regional conflict premium and adds to risk-off dynamics.

properties.title: IRGC claims control of Strait of Hormuz; U.S. discusses potential naval escorts for tankers (as reported)
properties.location_resolved: مضیق هرمز, عمان
properties.implication: Heightened risk of incidents/miscalculation around escort operations; supports oil_up_risk and risk_off_flows.

properties.title: Multiple commercial vessels damaged by projectiles near Fujairah and the northern Strait of Hormuz
properties.location_resolved: الفجيرة, الإمارات العربية المتحدة
properties.implication: Physical damage and crew evacuations increase risk premia and likely deter transits.

properties.title: U.S. strike reported to hit Iranian warship far from Gulf amid widening conflict
properties.location_resolved: Centroid: Iran
properties.implication: Signals escalation scope; increases tail risk of wider maritime confrontation and retaliation.

properties.title: Qatar LNG shipments disrupted; force majeure declared amid reported attacks on facilities
properties.location_resolved: رأس لفان, قطر
properties.implication: LNG export outages compound Hormuz shipping issues; supports global gas prices.

properties.title: Iraq reported cutting oil production as storage fills due to inability to load tankers
properties.location_resolved: Basra, Al-Basrah Central Subdistrict, Al-Basrah District, Basra Governorate, 61001, Iraq
properties.implication: Upstream curtailments turn logistics disruption into real supply loss.

properties.title: U.S. signals naval escorts/insurance support to sustain Middle East energy exports
properties.location_resolved: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
properties.implication: Policy support may partially offset disruption but also underscores severity of shipping risk.

properties.title: Israeli strike reported hitting building in Baalbek amid Lebanon escalation
properties.location_resolved: Baalbek, طريق نحلة - بعلبك, El Sharawneh, Baalbek, Baalbek District, Baalbek-Hermel Governorate, 1800, Lebanon
properties.implication: Sustained strikes raise risk of broader escalation and market risk-off.

properties.title: U.S. banks on heightened alert for Iran-linked cyberattacks as war escalates
properties.location_resolved: New York, United States
properties.implication: Increased cyber-defense posture may coincide with elevated market plumbing risk and risk-off sentiment.

properties.title: Iranian missiles hit central Israel (Tel Aviv district impacts reported)
properties.location_resolved: Tel-Aviv, Tel Aviv Subdistrict, Tel-Aviv District, Israel
properties.implication: Direct Iran-Israel kinetic exchange increases escalation risk and broadens risk-off impulse.

properties.title: Saudi Aramco attempts to reroute crude exports to Yanbu to bypass Hormuz; pipeline/Red Sea constraints highlighted
properties.location_resolved: Yanbu`, Yanbu, Medina Province, 46424, Saudi Arabia
properties.implication: Rerouting alleviates some supply risk but raises freight costs and shifts risk to Red Sea routes.

properties.title: Saudi Arabia considers diverting crude exports to Red Sea terminals to bypass Hormuz
properties.location_resolved: Yanbu`, Yanbu, Medina Province, 46424, Saudi Arabia
properties.implication: Rerouting can reduce Hormuz dependence but faces capacity/shipping constraints; supports freight premia.

properties.title: Energy prices surge as Hormuz disruption persists; Iraq output cuts and attacks on energy/logistics sites reported
properties.location_resolved: الفجيرة, الإمارات العربية المتحدة
properties.implication: Energy and shipping shock raises inflation risks and supports risk_off_flows; spillovers to gas and freight.

properties.title: US embassy complex in Riyadh hit by drones, Saudi defence ministry says
properties.location_resolved: Riyadh Region, Saudi Arabia
properties.implication: Attack on diplomatic facilities escalates political risk and can trigger further security measures and retaliation.

properties.title: US orders some diplomatic staff to leave Bahrain, Iraq and Jordan as Iran conflict escalates
properties.location_resolved: Manama, Capital Governorate, 308, Bahrain
properties.implication: Drawdown signals elevated threat environment; can disrupt consular operations and business travel across key hubs.

properties.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed and threatens ships attempting to transit
properties.location_resolved: مضیق هرمز, عمان
properties.implication: Even partial closure can disrupt ~20% of global oil flows and LNG shipments, sharply lifting freight, insurance and oil risk premia.

properties.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed and threatens ships attempting to transit
properties.location_resolved: مضیق هرمز, عمان
properties.implication: Even partial closure can disrupt ~20% of global oil flows and LNG shipments, sharply lifting freight, insurance and oil risk premia.

properties.title: Fuel tanker Athe Nova reported hit by drones and burning in Strait of Hormuz
properties.location_resolved: مضیق هرمز, عمان
properties.implication: Attack on a tanker reinforces physical risk to maritime flows; increases chance of shipping stand-down and insurance withdrawal.

properties.title: Fuel tanker Athe Nova reported hit by drones and burning in Strait of Hormuz
properties.location_resolved: مضیق هرمز, عمان
properties.implication: Attack on a tanker reinforces physical risk to maritime flows; increases chance of shipping stand-down and insurance withdrawal.

properties.title: Saudi Aramco shuts Ras Tanura refinery after drone strike, sources say

properties.title: Marine insurers cancel war-risk cover as Iran conflict intensifies
properties.location_resolved: Greater London, England, United Kingdom
properties.implication: Withdrawal/pricing of war-risk cover can reduce voyage availability and push tanker/container rates higher, feeding inflation and delivered energy costs.

properties.title: Global oil and gas shipping costs surge to records amid Hormuz risk
properties.location_resolved: Centroid: oman
properties.implication: Record freight and insurance costs tighten effective supply and lift price volatility across crude, LNG and refined products.

properties.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says
properties.location_resolved: Centroid: oman
properties.implication: Container delays amplify supply-chain disruptions beyond energy, pressuring goods inflation and corporate margins.

properties.title: AWS reports outages after UAE data center struck by objects
properties.location_resolved: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
properties.implication: Data-center disruption can ripple into payments, trading, and logistics, adding to risk-off sentiment.

properties.title: Kuwait intercepts hostile drones on third day of Iran retaliatory strikes

properties.implication: Sustained drone threat keeps regional air defenses on high alert; raises risk to energy and base-adjacent assets.

properties.title: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz grinds to near halt; large backlog of tankers and cargo vessels

properties.implication: Near-halt at a chokepoint for ~1/5 of global oil/LNG raises supply and freight/insurance risks.
